name: Eyes On The Prize: Keyword
official_rules_text: While a unit with the Eyes on the Prize keyword has its unit leader within 7 of 1 or more Objective tokens or is holding 1 or more Objective tokens, it has the listed keyword.
description: While a unit with the Eyes on the Prize keyword has its unit leader within 7 of 1 or more Objective tokens or is holding 1 or more Objective tokens, it has the listed keyword.
